subcodes.first_line: From the visible world and the mysteries of the Book, unveiled and unobscured, the Path of God with its evidence standeth manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و از عالم ظاهر و اسرار کتاب من غیر ستر و حجاب لائح سبیل الهی مع الدلیل واضح و نازل
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
